title: DataCamp Student Developer Pack Offer
description: DataCamp helps companies and individuals make better use of data. Our users build data fluency while learning from the world’s top data scientists.
eligibility: Verified students aged 13 or older who are approved for the GitHub Student Developer Pack; provider restrictions may also apply.
value: DataCamp has partnered with GitHub Education to offer three months of free access when you sign up for a DataCamp subscription with your GitHub student account.
